purpose: Curate the top 100 operator and agent commands so the command runner default surface exposes high-signal work paths while hiding compatibility aliases by default.

overrides.description: Run a command by registry id through the metadata-aware command runner; preferred agent entrypoint over raw package-script spelunking.

selection_policy.default_runner_behavior: tools/commands/command_runner.ts lists only operator_surface=true entries unless --operator-surface=0 or --include-compat=1 is used.
selection_policy.refresh_rule: Update this contract when a command should become part of the default operator surface; then sync tools/commands/command_registry.json and run command_metadata_curated_guard.

commands.description: Plan Rust production-candidate crate cargo-check evidence from the support manifest.
Execute cargo check for Rust production-candidate crates and write evidence.
Guard Rust production-candidate cargo-check evidence and promotion readiness.

Guard Rust production candidates so manifest-ready alone is not enough for promotion.
